assertion_results.text: The third JQL query uses labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA) to find triaged CVEs still in a pre-QA state
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md line 13 shows the exact JQL: 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, 'ON_QA') ORDER BY created DESC' — matches the assertion's required labels IN and status NOT IN clauses.

assertion_results.text: For each query 3 result, the skill checks issuelinks for linked Tasks with link type Depend and fetches each linked Task's status
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md describes the methodology (line 16): 'For each result, inspect its issuelinks for linked Tasks with link type Depend.' Each of the 3 candidates (TC-9020, TC-9023, TC-9026) has a 'Linked Remediation Tasks (link type Depend)' section showing Task keys, issue types, and statuses (e.g., TC-9021 Done, TC-9022 Closed, TC-9024 Done, TC-9025 In Progress, and none for TC-9026).

assertion_results.text: TC-9020 is included in Ready for QA because ALL linked remediation Tasks are completed (TC-9021 Done, TC-9022 Closed)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 49 shows TC-9020 in the Ready for QA table with 'Remediation Tasks' column showing 'TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)'. Line 51 states: 'All linked remediation Tasks are completed (TC-9021 Done, TC-9022 Closed).' ready-for-qa.md line 45 confirms: 'Result: QUALIFIED -- Ready for QA'.

assertion_results.text: TC-9023 is excluded from Ready for QA because TC-9025 is still In Progress — remediation is not complete
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 55: 'TC-9023 (CVE-2026-39102, In Progress): Excluded -- remediation still in progress. TC-9024 is Done but TC-9025 is still In Progress.' ready-for-qa.md line 73: 'TC-9025 is still In Progress. The rule requires ALL linked remediation Tasks to be Done or Closed.'

assertion_results.text: TC-9026 is excluded from Ready for QA because it has no linked Tasks with type Depend — no remediation to verify
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 56: 'TC-9026 (CVE-2026-39330, Modified): Excluded -- no linked Tasks with link type "Depend" exist. No remediation to verify.' ready-for-qa.md line 84-88 shows '(none)' under linked remediation tasks and line 92: 'Result: EXCLUDED -- No remediation to verify'.

assertion_results.text: The Ready for QA section includes a Remediation Tasks column showing the linked tasks and their statuses
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 47 shows the table header: '| Issue | Status | CVE | Summary | Created | Remediation Tasks |' and line 49 populates it with 'TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)' for TC-9020.

assertion_results.text: For each Ready for QA issue, the output suggests transitioning to ON_QA
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 51: 'TC-9020: Consider transitioning to ON_QA. All linked remediation Tasks are completed.' ready-for-qa.md line 47: 'Recommendation: Consider transitioning TC-9020 to ON_QA.' TC-9020 is the only issue in the Ready for QA list, and it has a transition suggestion.
